message.content:
@startuml
participant UI as "UI"
participant sessionRoute as "sessionRoute"
participant passport as "passport"
participant SessionController as "SessionController"
participant innoDB as "innoDB"

note right of UI
GET() "/session"
Auth: Bearer token
{userID, DASS21_SCORES, sessionDetails}
end note

note right of sessionRoute
"/save", authenticate("jwt")
end note

alt [Success: Authenticated]
    sessionRoute -> done(null, user) : done(null, user)
    sessionRoute -> Request Products : Request Products
    SessionController -> Validate info : Validate info
    SessionController -> saveSession() : saveSession()
    SessionController -> session : session
    sessionRoute -> httpResponse(200) : httpResponse(200)
    sessionRoute -> session : session
    sessionRoute -> httpResponse(200) : httpResponse(200)
    sessionRoute -> allProducts : allProducts
end alt

alt [Success: Required info provided]
    alt [Failure: missing information]
        sessionRoute -> {"msg":"missing required information"}(400) : {"msg":"missing required information"}(400)
        sessionRoute -> http Response(400) : http Response(400)
        sessionRoute -> {"msg":"missing required information"} : {"msg":"missing required information"}
    end alt
end alt

alt [Failure: Unauthorized]
    sessionRoute -> done(null, false) : done(null, false)
    sessionRoute -> http Response(401) : http Response(401)
    sessionRoute -> Unauthorized : Unauthorized
end alt

@enduml
